creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Slawomir Wojciech Wojtczak from comment #5)

% fstyp /dev/da0
fstyp: /dev/da0: not a disk
% lsblk da0
DEVICE         MAJ:MIN SIZE TYPE                                          LABEL MOUNT
da0              0:194   0B freebsd-swap                                      - SWAP
%
